name: DatePickerComponent
description:
The datetime picker component is an opinionated composition of the fd-popover and
fd-calendar components to accomplish the UI pattern for picking a date.

Supports Angular Forms.
```html
<fd-date-picker [(ngModel)]="date"></fd-date-picker>
```

inputs.name: activeView
inputs.description: Actually shown active view one of 'day' | 'month' | 'year' in calendar component

inputs.name: aggregatedYearGrid
inputs.description:
Object to customize aggregated year grid,
Row, Columns and method to display year can be modified

inputs.name: allowMultipleSelection
inputs.description:
Whether the user wants to select multiple days or multiple range dates.
If `displayWeekNumbers` is true, the user can click on the week number to mark the related row.
The user can click on week days to mark the related column.
Note: Clickable selection for week row or column does not work for range selections.

inputs.name: allowNull
inputs.description: Whether a null input is considered valid.

inputs.name: appendTo
inputs.description: The element to which the popover should be appended.

inputs.name: ariaLabelledBy
inputs.description: aria-labelledby for element describing date-picker.

inputs.name: buttonFocusable
inputs.deprecated: Popover is toggled with f4 key

inputs.name: closeOnDateChoose
inputs.description: Defines if date picker should be closed after date choose

inputs.name: customDateTimeFormat
inputs.description: Define a custom datetime format. Can be a string for DayjsDatetimeAdapter or object for FdDatetimeAdapter

inputs.name: dateRangeFormat
inputs.description:
Whether to select and display the date range in MM/YYYY or YYYY format
For month and year format value is 'month'
For year format value is 'year'

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Whether the date picker is disabled.

inputs.name: inline
inputs.description: Should date picker be inlined.

inputs.name: inputId
inputs.description: ID attribute for input element inside DatePicker component

inputs.name: legendCol
inputs.description: Whether the legend should display in column layout instead of row layout. Default is false.

inputs.name: markWeekends
inputs.description: Whether user wants to mark sunday/saturday with `fd-calendar__item--weekend` class

inputs.name: mobile
inputs.description: Whether date picker should rendered in mobile mode.

inputs.name: mobileConfig
inputs.description: Mobile mode configuration.

inputs.name: mobileLandscape
inputs.description: Whether calendar is used inside mobile in landscape mode, it also adds close button on right side

inputs.name: mobilePortrait
inputs.description: Whether calendar is used inside mobile in portrait mode

inputs.name: nextButtonDisableFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable next button in the calendar header.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description: Date picker input placeholder string

inputs.name: placement
inputs.description:
The placement of the popover. It can be one of: top, top-start, top-end, bottom,
 bottom-start, bottom-end, right, right-start, right-end, left, left-start, left-end.

inputs.name: preventScrollOnFocus
inputs.description: Whether to prevent page scrolling when focusing date picker input field after calendar has been closed.

inputs.name: previousButtonDisableFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable previous button in the calendar header.

inputs.name: processInputOnBlur
inputs.description:
Whether to recalculate value from the input as user types or on blur.
By default, updates the value as user types.

inputs.name: rangeHoverEffect
inputs.description:
Whether user wants to mark day cells on hover.
Works only on range mode, when start date is selected on Day View.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: If it is mandatory field

inputs.name: selectedDate
inputs.description: The currently selected date model in single mode.

inputs.name: selectedMultipleDateRanges
inputs.description: The currently selected date model with multiple ranges.

inputs.name: selectedMultipleDates
inputs.description: The currently selected date model in multiple mode.

inputs.name: selectedRangeDate
inputs.description: The currently selected date model with start and end in range mode.

inputs.name: showCalendarLegend
inputs.description: Whether to display the calendar legend below the calendar. Default is false.

inputs.name: showTodayButton
inputs.description: Enables Today-Selection-Button if true

inputs.name: showWeekNumbers
inputs.description: Whether user wants to show week numbers next to days

inputs.name: specialDaysRules
inputs.description:
Special days mark, it can be used by passing array of object with
Special day number, list 1-20 [class:`fd-calendar__item--legend-{{number}}`] is available there:
https://sap.github.io/fundamental-styles/components/calendar.html calendar special days section
Rule accepts method with FdDate object as a parameter. ex:
`rule: (fdDate: FdDate) => fdDate.getDay() === 1`, which will mark all sundays as special day.

inputs.name: startingDayOfWeek
inputs.description: The day of the week the calendar should start on. 1 represents Sunday, 2 is Monday, 3 is Tuesday, and so on.

inputs.name: todayButtonLabel
inputs.description: Label for Today-Selection-Button

inputs.name: type
inputs.description: The type of calendar, 'single' for single date selection or 'range' for a range of dates.

inputs.name: useValidation
inputs.description: Whether to validate the date picker input.

inputs.name: yearGrid
inputs.description:
Object to customize year grid,
Row, Columns and method to display year can be modified

outputs.name: activeViewChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time calendar active view is changed

outputs.name: isOpenChange
outputs.description: Event emitted when the state of the isOpen property changes.

outputs.name: selectedDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected date in single mode is changed

outputs.name: selectedMultipleDateRangesChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time the first or last date in multiple range mode is changed.

outputs.name: selectedMultipleDatesChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time the selected dates in multiple mode are changed.

outputs.name: selectedRangeDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected first or last date in range mode is changed

methods.name: _beforePopoverOpen
methods.description:
Renders the calendar right before the popover is opened.
Used for correct calculations of overlay position and size.

methods.name: closeCalendar
methods.description: Closes the calendar if it is open

methods.name: handleCalendarActiveViewChange
methods.description: Method that handle calendar active view change and throws event.

methods.name: isModelValid
methods.description: Method that provides information if model selected date/dates have properly types and are valid

methods.name: toggleCalendar
methods.description: Toggles the calendar open or closed
